title: Bountiful Fares
description: Enhances the food and farming side of Minecraft!
body:
![Bountiful Fares](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ff77b556f36b179d51d74b3cb8eadcfc148522.png) **Bountiful Fares expands upon existing mechanics and adds simple, new content to the food and farming aspect of Minecraft.** Please note that features may be added or changed in the future.
PLEASE READ IF UPDATING TO VERSION 3.0.0+! Updating from a version before 3.0.0 to one after will break a few things in your world: **Trellises** - trellis blocks with plants may disappear. It is recommended to break the plants on them before updating. **Tea Blends** - tea blend items have been removed and their functionality has been replaced by the items they are made of. **Custard** - custard items have been removed.


![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0418a9c6cba2880676b82f869e5098d41d578819.png) #### - Fruit trees - for Apples, Oranges, Lemons, Plums, and Coconuts #### - Wild crops and new crop types - such as Passion Fruit, Leeks, and Spongekins #### - Trellises - for decoration or growing vine crops #### - New ancient plants from Sniffers - Hoary Apple Trees and Lapisberries #### - Ceramic blocks - which can be dyed any color #### - New food effects - adds some extra complexity to food #### - Fermentation - unlocks new recipes like Mead or Cider #### - Many new food items and blocks #### - New paintings - featuring content from the mod ## ### **For more information on how features work, check out the [wiki](https://github.com/Heccology/Bountiful-Fares/wiki).**

![Frequently asked questions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7083d0b815d527fb670ba807c3c4f793662463c7.png) ### Is this a Farmer's Delight addon? No, this is an independent mod. ### Will there be a Bedrock version? / Can I port Bountiful Fares to Bedrock? No, don't expect anything Bedrock-related, and please do not port it yourself. ### Will there be a port to [insert past version] / Can I port Bountiful Fares to [insert past version]? No, some features require the latest versions, and please do not port it yourself. ### What versions will Bountiful Fares be updated to? Currently, only the 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 versions are being updated, its unlikely anything past that will get a port. ### Can I use Bountiful Fares in a modpack/server/other content? Absolutely! ### Can I use Bountiful Fares's models/textures for a separate project? No, please don't use any of it's models/textures for anything else, even with credit. (Check license on github) ### Can I use Bountiful Fares's assets for an addon of this mod? In short, yes! But please check the license on gitub.

![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3749759aeac0f5ad6575851811e34cdef9753eb9.png) ### - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) ### - [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) ### - [Art's and Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artsandcrafts) ### - [Appledog](https://modrinth.com/mod/appledog) ### - [No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land) ### - [Frontiers](https://modrinth.com/mod/frontiers-mod) ### - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) ### - [Delicate Dyes](https://modrinth.com/mod/delicate-dyes)

Translation - May occasionally be outdated
